column7: Supports high yield potential; nitrogen management at PI and heading stages key for grain filling.
Supports high-yield potential from establishment; balanced NPK improves crop uniformity.
Promotes high grain N content; sulfur prevents protein deficiency at heading stage.
Supports high yield stability; potassium improves resilience against end-of-season moisture stress.
Enhances stress resilience during reproductive stage; biostimulant supports uniform heading and grain maturation.
Sea kelp promotes uniform heading; nano-scale nutrients correct hidden deficiencies for improved yield stability.
Promotes soil biological activity; organic mix supports nitrogen mineralization from soil organic matter reserves.
Pre-plant Azolla incorporation builds soil N; improves long-term soil fertility for high-yield inbred varieties.
